name: zion-nocode
description: Orientation and entry point for working on a Zion project. Load first for any Zion app task — designing or changing the data model, UI, server-side action flows, permissions, payments, or data bindings, or reading runtime logs — then follow it to the right capability. For Zion projects only; not generic programming help.
author: Zion

interface.longDescription: Zion-specific guidance and CLI recipes for the data model, UI components, data bindings, server-side action flows, payments, permissions, and runtime logs.
